programme.title: Love By Design
programme.desc: (2023) Magical romance with Jackie Moore. On her 30th birthday, heartbroken Brooke wishes for everything on her teenage vision board to come true. But when it does, will life have a different plan?

programme.title: Law Of Attraction
programme.desc: Allison Williams, a young female attorney, tries to impress her law firm partners in an attempt to make partner with her first big case.

programme.title: Sweet Home Carolina
programme.desc: (2017) Romantic comedy starring Heather McComb. A stressed-out single mum moves to South Carolina to claim an inherited house, where unexpected love and Southern charm await.

programme.title: When Love Came to Town
programme.desc: Abby is a famous author whose latest stop on her book tour takes her to the town of Bliss. But little does she know that the locals are keen to play matchmaker for her. Lauren Holly stars. (2014)

programme.title: Love At First Dance
programme.desc: Hope is tasked with teaching Manhattan's most eligible bachelor how to dance ahead of his society wedding. Will their blossoming student-teacher relationship ultimately jeopardise the wedding? (2018)

programme.title: Love's Complicated
programme.desc: (2016) Rom-com with Holly Marie Combs. People pleaser Leah is enrolled in a conflict management class with her nemesis, shock jock Cinco Dublin. Will the pair learn to see eye to eye?

programme.title: The Movie Star and the Cowboy
programme.desc: (2022) Romance starring MacKenzie Porter and Toby Levins. Actress Isabella is desperate to land her dream role as a rancher - but will learning the ropes in Montana also land her a leading man?

programme.title: Valentine Ever After
programme.desc: Keen to escape the big city, Julia and Sydney head to Wyoming for a fun getaway. However, the trip sees Julia re-evaluate her life choices, including her career and the man she truly loves. (2016)

programme.title: Valentine In The Vineyard
programme.desc: With the sound of impending wedding bells in the air, Frankie and Nate start to question their compatibility as a couple. Rachael Lee Cook stars. (2019)

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: A mechanic and her father compete with a rival repair shop to keep their shop afloat. Starring Katherine Barrell (2024)

programme.title: Love By Design
programme.desc: (2023) Magical romance with Jackie Moore. On her 30th birthday, heartbroken Brooke wishes for everything on her teenage vision board to come true. But when it does, will life have a different plan?

programme.title: Law Of Attraction
programme.desc: Allison Williams, a young female attorney, tries to impress her law firm partners in an attempt to make partner with her first big case.

programme.title: Sweet Home Carolina
programme.desc: (2017) Romantic comedy starring Heather McComb. A stressed-out single mum moves to South Carolina to claim an inherited house, where unexpected love and Southern charm await.

programme.title: When Love Came to Town
programme.desc: Abby is a famous author whose latest stop on her book tour takes her to the town of Bliss. But little does she know that the locals are keen to play matchmaker for her. Lauren Holly stars. (2014)

programme.title: The Professional Bridesmaid
programme.desc: (2023) Romance starring Hunter King. Maggie knows how to help brides get hitched without a hitch. But when she's booked for a high-profile wedding, does she have a plan for falling in love herself?

programme.title: A Wedding Wonderland
programme.desc: Family conflicts force a happy couple to swap their tropical wedding for a small-town winter wedding in the snow. Starring Andrea Bowen (2017)
